changes.summary: Added ClosePublicationUseCase (BC-03) with execute(): author/beneficiary or Birzha source-manager gate, inv-04 active-status check before close, resolveManualCloseReason for negative-rating manual close, delegates to PostClosingService.closePost. Exposes createClosePublicationUseCase factory.

Added WithdrawPublicationRatingUseCase (BC-03) extracting publications.withdraw logic: inv-04 closed-post rejection, inv-08 authorization (canUserWithdraw / Birzha source admin) before wallet credit, investment split via distributeOnWithdrawal, Birzha CommunityWallet deposit or personal wallet processWithdrawal, score reduction. Exposes createWithdrawPublicationRatingUseCase factory.
publications.close and publications.withdraw delegate to use cases; removed ~130 lines of inline orchestration.

Added resolveManualCloseReason(currentScore) mapping score < 0 to negative_rating else manual; documented inv-04 archive enforcement (status=closed excludes from feeds/tappalka and blocks modification).

verification.tsc_changed_files: no errors filtered for changed paths

notes: Manual close now sets closeReason negative_rating when metrics.score is negative (was always manual in router). PostClosingService.closePost unchanged for ttl/inactive/system closes; archive semantics remain status=closed via existing closePost update.
